svg.title: MK Flu-Pipe v1.0 — Pipeline Diagram
svg.desc: Fluxograma com 17 etapas do pipeline MK Flu-Pipe para montagem, subtipagem e análise avançada de genomas de Influenza.
svg.text: Influenza genome assembly · subtyping · advanced analysis pipeline
Illumina · BGI · ONT · Ion Torrent · SRA/ENA
Custom adapter FASTA · host depletion toggle · ONT min/max length
8 genomic segments per sample · invalid bases → N
Min. coverage · max %N · min. segments · PASS / WARN / FAIL
samtools depth — mean / min / max per segment and sample
Auto-download · BLAST index · updated every 30 days
HA (seg. 4) · NA (seg. 6) → type A/B/C/D + H and N subtypes
H1N1pdm · H3N2 · Influenza B · H5Nx — datasets updated every 30 days
Canonical variant calling + full genome varcall
iVar — canonical WHO refs (NA H275Y · PA I38T · M2 S31N)
Step 10b — all 8 segments · NCBI RefSeq + GFF3 · protein mutations table
NA H275Y · PA I38T · M2 S31N — antiviral_resistance.tsv
NS1 D92E — interferon resistance · PB1-F2 N66S — pathogenicity
typing_results.tsv · base normalization (→ N) · MultiQC HTML report
Jean Phellipe M. Nascimento — LACEN/AL — Laboratório de Vigilância Genômica
